user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
buyers and sellers are looking for the best prices,
buyers want to buy low, sellers want to sell high.
market is about looking for liquidity: the price level that both side accepts: 
the highest price, buyers accept, 
and the lowest, sellers are still willing to sell at
